creator: mwm@mired.org
text:
Trying to build the xcdplayer port on 5.0-current breaks with
	a message about b_io in /usr/include/sys/buf.h having an incomplete
	type.

Fix: 

I added an include for <sys/bio.h> just in front of the one for
	<sys/buf.h> in cdrom_freebsd.c in the work directory. I assume
	that this built on previous versions and that bio.h is
	new. Someone with more knowledge of building ports that work
	on all required platforms should provide a patch that works
	properly.
How-To-Repeat: 
	# cd /usr/ports/audio/xcdplayer
	# make
	and observe the results.
